MINI MINUTES:
Order To Show Cause.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

The Court will approve the proposed stipulated permanent injunction and final judgment submitted by the parties on April 1, 2021.

The Stipulated Permanent Injunction And Final Judgment Order is signed. (see the scanned final judgment order filed this date for complete details of the stipulated permanent injunction)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Tim Travelstead (650-403-0150; ) of Narayan Travelsted PC for Plaintiff, The Regents of the University of California.
Ellen Leonida (415-599-0210; leonida@braunhagey.com) hof Braun Hagey & Borden LLP for and with Defendant, Andrew Hom.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause is continued to March 25, 2021 at 9:30am. Counsel to submit their [proposed] stipulated permanent injunctive order to contestdept302tr@sftc.org by March 24, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
